data.title: Hong Kong Monetary Authority: Currently no offshore RMB stablecoin is issued in Hong Kong
data.description: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) has issued a warning on its official account regarding recent social media reports that the world's first stablecoin pegged to the offshore RMB has been issued in Hong Kong. Please note that this information is false. The Stablecoins Ordinance will come into effect on August 1, 2025. Anyone who issues a fiat stablecoin in the course of their business in Hong Kong, or actively promotes such an issuance to the Hong Kong public, will need to obtain a stablecoin issuer license from the HKMA. Currently, the HKMA has not issued any stablecoin issuer licenses. Therefore, anyone who issues or promotes a stablecoin is breaking the law. If you are approached by someone promoting a stablecoin, please remain vigilant. The HKMA will monitor stablecoin transactions in the market and, if any suspected violations of the Stablecoins Ordinance are identified, will consider taking further action based on the relevant facts and evidence.

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net outflow of 1,237 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net outflow of 21,865 ETH
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, today 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net outflow of 1,237 BTC, of ​​which Fidelity Liu held 676 BTC and currently holds 204,230 BTC; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net outflow of 21,865 ETH, of which Fidelity Liu held 15,222 ETH and currently holds 781,948 ETH.

data.title: Thumzup Media Corporation Announces $10 Million Stock Buyback Plan
data.description: According to PANews, Thumzup Media Corporation, a social media company supported by the Trump family, has announced a $10 million stock buyback plan approved by its board. This initiative is set to continue until December 31, 2026. Previously, the company completed a $1 million stock buyback plan in September 2025. As of September 19, 2025, Thumzup repurchased approximately 212,432 shares of common stock at a weighted average price of $4.71 per share, totaling around $1 million. The company also highlighted progress in its digital asset treasury strategy, currently holding 19,106 bitcoins and approximately 7.5 million dogecoins.

data.title: Crypto stocks saw mixed gains and losses at the opening of the US stock market, with Bitmine down 0.35%.
data.description: According to MyStonks data, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.17%, the S&P 500 rose 0.21%, and the Nasdaq rose 0.36%. The crypto sector saw mixed gains and losses, with Bitmine (NASDAQ: BMNR) down 0.35%, Circle (NYSE: CRCL) up 1.76%, Coinbase up 0.76%, SOL Strategies down 6.68%, ETHZilla (NASDAQ: ETHZ) down 0.75%, and BTCS up 1.98%. MyStonks is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, including US stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: US court rejects Justin Sun's bid to block Bloomberg from disclosing his cryptocurrency holdings
data.description: Judge Colm Connolly of the U.S. District Court for the District of Delaware ruled in favor of Justin Sun in his lawsuit against Bloomberg. Sun had previously filed a second motion seeking, among other things, a temporary restraining order prohibiting Bloomberg from disclosing the details of his holdings in specific cryptocurrencies. The judge ruled that Sun failed to prove that Bloomberg agreed not to disclose the details of his holdings, and that he must demonstrate such a commitment with clear and convincing evidence. Court documents reveal that Sun holds 60 billion TRX, 17,000 BTC, 224,000 ETH, and 700 million USDT. In February of this year, Bloomberg contacted Sun's team regarding the compilation of the Billionaires Index. After the article was published, Sun initially sued and then withdrew the lawsuit. After negotiations failed, Sun filed another motion on September 11th, requesting that Bloomberg remove the relevant content. He claimed the reporter had promised confidentiality, which Bloomberg denied. The judge also ruled that Sun failed to prove that disclosing the information would make him more vulnerable, and that the Bitcoin information he disclosed was more specific. (Cryptonews)

data.title: StablecoinX, a suspected ENA treasury company, withdrew another 11.87 million ENA from Binance in the past three hours, worth $7.2 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi's monitoring, StablecoinX, a suspected ENA treasury company, withdrew another 11.87 million ENA from Binance in the past three hours, worth US$7.2 million. The number of ENA currently held has grown to 104 million, with a total value of US$63.67 million.

data.title: Stablecorp Completes $3.6 Million in Strategic Round of Funding Led by FTP Ventures
data.description: Stablecorp, a provider of bank-grade digital asset infrastructure, announced the completion of a US$3.6 million (CAD$5 million) strategic round of financing, led by FTP Ventures, with participation from existing shareholders and new investors. The company previously received investment from Coinbase Ventures. The new funds will be used to expand its related digital currency infrastructure, including support for its digital currency QCAD, which is fully backed 1:1 by Canadian dollar reserves. (Prnewswire)

data.title: A whale went long on HYPE with 10x leverage two hours ago, and has accumulated losses of $41.9 million in the past 40 days.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, a whale named "0xa523" went long on 450,766 HYPE tokens (worth $20.5 million) with 10x leverage two hours ago. Over the past 40 days, he has completed 15 trades, resulting in a cumulative loss of $41.9 million and a win rate of just 66.67%.

data.title: GRS Files for Five New Cryptocurrency-Related ETFs
data.description: According to PANews, GRS has submitted applications for five new cryptocurrency-related exchange-traded funds (ETFs). The proposed ETFs include the GRS Digital Asset Treasury Companies ETF, GRS Ethereum Staking Opportunity ETF, GRS Crypto StakingMax ETF, GRS Crypto Core3 ETF, and GRS Ethereum YieldEdge ETF. This development was disclosed by Bloomberg ETF analyst Eric Balchunas.

data.title: USDC Treasury Mints 250 Million USDC on Solana Blockchain
data.description: According to PANews, Whale Alert has reported that the USDC Treasury recently minted 250 million USDC on the Solana blockchain. This development highlights ongoing activities within the digital currency space as the Solana network continues to be a significant platform for cryptocurrency transactions.

data.title: SUI Group Reports Significant Holdings and Stock Buyback
data.description: According to Foresight News, SUI Group, a Nasdaq-listed company, has disclosed its holdings of 105,630,660 SUI tokens as of September 23. At a price of $3.40 per token, the total value of these holdings is approximately $359 million. Additionally, the company announced a stock buyback, spending around $1.2 million to repurchase 276,296 shares of common stock.

data.title: Solana Treasury Company SOL Strategies Plans to Raise $25 Million in a Rights Issue to Support Increased SOL Holdings
data.description: Solana treasury company SOL Strategies announced that it has raised $25 million in a private placement through the sale of common shares and common share warrants pursuant to the listed issuer financing exemptions granted by the Canadian Securities Administrators. Canaccord Genuity Corp. served as lead agent and sole bookrunner. The proceeds will be used for general corporate purposes and digital asset investments to fuel the growth of SOL's treasury. (Globenewswire)

data.title: BNB Drops Below 1,010 USDT with a 0.65% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Sep 24, 2025, 13:57 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 1,010 USDT and is now trading at 1,009.820007 USDT, with a narrowed 0.65% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: OKX will launch XPL (Plasma) spot trading and convert pre-market contracts to standard perpetual contracts.
data.description: According to an official announcement, OKX will soon list XPL (Plasma) and convert XPL pre-market contracts to standard perpetual contracts. The specific schedule is as follows: XPL deposits will be available: 2025-09-08 (UTC+8) on September 24, 2025. XPL call auction period: 8:00-9:00 PM on September 25, 2025 (UTC+8). XPL/USDT spot trading will open: 9:00 PM on September 25, 2025 (UTC+8). XPL/USDT pre-market contract conversion will take place within three hours from 9:00 PM on September 25, 2025 (UTC+8). As long as the index remains stable during this period, we will complete the contract conversion. XPL withdrawals will be available: 12:00 AM on September 26, 2025 (UTC+8).

data.title: Franklin Templeton Integrates Benji Platform into BNB Chain
data.description: Franklin Templeton announced the expansion of its Benji technology platform to the BNB Chain ecosystem to enhance tokenization capabilities. The collaboration aims to leverage BNB Chain's scalable and low-cost infrastructure to create new on-chain financial assets. Franklin Templeton's Benji technology platform is an integrated stack designed to facilitate the 24/7 trading, management, and yield distribution of tokenized assets. The platform has expanded to multiple blockchains, including Stellar, Ethereum, and VeChain. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Belfort, a cryptographic computing development company, has secured $6 million in seed funding led by Vsquared Ventures.
data.description: Belfort, a company developing encrypted computing, announced the completion of a $6 million seed round of funding led by Vsquared Ventures, with participation from Anagram, Protocol VC, Inovia Capital, Syndicate One, Prototype, Credibly Neutral, and investors including Google Chief Scientist Jeff Dean and Naval Ravikant. The company supports data processing in encrypted form, with applications in blockchain, finance, healthcare, and government operations. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Fitell Corporation spent $10 million to purchase 46,144 SOL
data.description: Fitell Corporation (FTEL), a Nasdaq-listed company, announced its initial acquisition of 46,144 Solana tokens for approximately $10 million. This is the first strategic acquisition under the company’s previously announced Solana financial plan. The acquisition of Solana tokens follows the initial closing of the company’s $100 million financing arrangement. FTEL plans to use a significant portion of the net proceeds from the initial closing to make additional Solana token purchases. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Nextech3D.ai Announces Two-Track Blockchain Ticketing Roadmap
data.description:
TORONTO, ON, September 24th, 2025 – Nextech3D. ai (CSE: NTAR) (OTCQX: NEXCF) (FSE: 1SS) (the “Company” or “Nextech3D. ai”), an AI-powered event management company, today announced more details of its previously announced blockchain ticketing roadmap. The company is executing a two-track rollout of its blockchain ticketing platform which unifies ticketing, payments, identity, and AR/AI navigation
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/nextech3d-ai-announces-two-track-blockchain-ticketing-roadmap/

data.title: Zeus Network CEO: Zeus will enable BNB Chain DeFi protocol to generate Bitcoin income
data.description: At the X Space event co-hosted by Odaily Planet Daily and Zeus Network on the evening of September 23rd, Zeus Network co-founder and CEO Justin discussed his experience with the recent Binance Alpha node launch. He stated that the Binance team maintains a close eye on the Bitcoin ecosystem and, during discussions, recognized the cross-chain approach provided by Zeus—using zBTC to bring native Bitcoin to high-quality public chains like Solana, rather than creating a new independent chain. Justin noted that Binance has observed that most zBTC deposits come from retail investors, indicating that ordinary users are actively using this technology to gain access to Bitcoin returns. He believes that if Zeus's infrastructure layer is deployed on BNB Chain, it will have the potential to bring real Bitcoin returns to more DeFi or CeDeFi protocols, attracting more BNB users.

data.title: Zeus Network CEO: The core of the Solana and BNB Chain deployment is to build Bitcoin applications with millions of users
data.description: On the evening of September 23rd, at the X Space event co-hosted by Odaily Planet Daily and Zeus Network, Justin, co-founder and CEO of Zeus Network, shared his views on Bitcoin DeFi and the multi-chain landscape. He stated that the team has been continuously building on Solana since participating in the 2020 Global Hackathon, prioritizing the resilience and continued contributions of its developer community over simple technical indicators. The team is committed to creating applications that can attract millions of real users, bringing Bitcoin, a "dormant" trillion-dollar asset, to life within efficient ecosystems like Solana and BNB Chain. Regarding Ethereum, he believes that mainnet activity is declining. His discussion of BNB Chain is related to changes in the US legal landscape, the return of CZ, and the significant advantages of exchange traffic. Justin emphasized that in the future, the industry may only need two or three mainstream public chains, with Ethereum, Solana, and BNB Chain coexisting to drive innovation. The focus of competition in the next industry cycle will no longer be on TVL, but on user volume and project revenue.
